scripts.install:templates: bun install --cwd templates/astro --frozen-lockfile && bun install --cwd templates/tanstack-start --frozen-lockfile
scripts.check:templates: bun run --cwd templates/astro check && bun run --cwd templates/tanstack-start check
scripts.check: bun run check:root && bun run shared:check && bun run check:templates
scripts.build: bun run --cwd templates/astro build && bun run --cwd templates/tanstack-start build
